environmental_failures.reason: Names ONLY sibling-campaign run_ids whose gitignored decision-drops bleed into the shared working tree: iterate-2026-06-12-triage-tooling-hardening, iterate-2026-06-12-utf8-churn-merge. Neither is iterate-2026-06-12-installer-shell-fixes. Pre-existing cross-sub-iterate drift (campaign 2026-06-10-audit-1-auto parallel waves), not caused by this iterate. Per the sub-iterate brief, treat as environmental drift.

surface_verification.justification: POSIX shell-script bugfixes (install.sh, update-marketplace.sh, verify-setup.sh) — no startable app surface. The touches_io_boundary write (the .env.local dotenv reader in verify-setup.sh) is empirically pinned: the full verify-setup.sh was run end-to-end against a .env.local whose value contained $(touch PWNED) (no PWNED file = no injection; the old `source` would have executed it), plus the F33 prereq-loop and F35 alias-strip probes. See the iterate ADR Confidence Calibration section.

behaviors.behavior: F33: the missing-prerequisite counter in install.sh must not abort under set -e from 0 (premise: bare ((m++)) does abort)
behaviors.evidence: test_installer_shell_scripts.py::test_f33_raw_post_increment_from_zero_aborts + ::test_f33_missing_counter_does_not_abort_under_set_e PASSED (drives the actual install.sh increment idiom; N increments from 0 reach N, exit 0)

behaviors.behavior: F34: install.sh exports the real astral install dir (~/.local/bin) after installing uv
F35: the emitted shipwright() alias lists all 13 plugins incl. shipwright-adopt; a stale alias is refreshed (not skipped) with a backup + non-empty guard
behaviors.evidence: test_f35_alias_lists_all_thirteen_plugins + ::test_f35_alias_refresh_not_blocked_by_stale_guard + ::test_f35_alias_refresh_backs_up_and_guards_empty PASSED; empirical awk strip-and-rewrite probe in Confidence Calibration preserved user content + created backup

behaviors.behavior: F36: every --plugin-dir path is quoted; the emitted alias survives a space-containing REPO_ROOT (each path is a single argument)
behaviors.evidence: test_f36_alias_quotes_plugin_dir_paths + ::test_f36_emitted_alias_survives_spaced_repo_root PASSED (evals the emitted block under REPO_ROOT='/tmp/dinovo GmbH/Sven Roth/shipwright' with a stub claude; 13 single-token plugin-dir args)

behaviors.behavior: F37: update-marketplace.sh resolves python3/python/py instead of a bare python; the resolver picks python3 when only python3 is on PATH
behaviors.evidence: test_f37_update_marketplace_resolves_a_python_interpreter (no bare `python -c`) + ::test_f37_python_resolver_picks_python3_when_python_absent PASSED (PATH with only a python3 shim resolves a non-empty $PYTHON_BIN)

behaviors.behavior: F38: verify-setup.sh parses .env.local via the canonical dotenv reader (no source); a spaced/$()-valued line is not executed; malformed key names are rejected; membership is fixed-string
behaviors.evidence: test_f38_verify_setup_does_not_source_env_local + ::test_f38_spaced_dotenv_value_does_not_execute_as_command + ::test_f38_verify_setup_filters_malformed_keys PASSED; full-script end-to-end injection probe (no PWNED) in Confidence Calibration

behaviors.behavior: Compliance path-canon: scripts/install.sh's quoted shipwright-compliance plugin-dir line (a -compliance hyphen-segment false positive) is allowlisted, not a real legacy artifact-path ref
behaviors.evidence: test_artifact_path_canon.py::test_no_legacy_artifact_paths[compliance-migrated] PASSED after adding scripts/install.sh to ALLOWLIST['compliance']
